narrative:
Precinct Ottawa Hills 2 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,208 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
